summary: Comprehensive testing of Stripe subscription billing system. All 30 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - billing page loads correctly with plan cards, subscription states, cancel confirmation UI, and payment history.
seed_data_creation: Created two test users: one free user and one with mock Growth subscription for UI state testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe subscription billing fully tested. All endpoints working: GET /api/billing/plans (5 plans), GET /api/billing/usage (with has_subscription, subscription_status), POST /api/billing/checkout (subscription mode), GET /api/billing/checkout/status/{session_id}, POST /api/billing/change-plan (requires active subscription), POST /api/billing/cancel (requires active subscription), GET /api/billing/subscription, GET /api/billing/transactions, POST /api/webhook/stripe (handles 4 event types). Frontend shows correct button states (Subscribe/Upgrade/Downgrade/Cancel) based on current plan and subscription status. Cancel confirmation UI works with confirm/keep buttons. Payment history shows transaction types correctly.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/billing/plans - ✅ Returns 5 plans with correct prices ($0, $29, $99, $399, -1)
GET /api/billing/usage - ✅ Returns has_subscription and subscription_status fields
POST /api/billing/checkout - ✅ Requires auth, rejects free/enterprise/invalid plans
POST /api/billing/checkout - ✅ Creates Stripe subscription checkout session for starter/growth/scale
POST /api/billing/change-plan - ✅ Requires auth, rejects without active subscription
POST /api/billing/cancel - ✅ Requires auth, rejects without active subscription
GET /api/billing/subscription - ✅ Returns has_subscription=false for free user
frontend_ui_tests: Current plan display - ✅ Shows 'Free' for free user, 'Growth' for subscribed user
Credits remaining - ✅ Shows correct credit count
Plan cards - ✅ All 5 plan cards displayed (free, starter, growth, scale, enterprise)
Plan buttons (free user) - ✅ Shows 'Current Plan' for free, 'Subscribe' for paid plans
Plan buttons (subscribed user) - ✅ Shows 'Cancel to Free', 'Downgrade', 'Current Plan', 'Upgrade', 'Contact Us'
Active Subscription badge - ✅ Shows for subscribed user, hidden for free user
Cancel confirmation UI - ✅ Appears with 'Yes, cancel subscription' and 'Keep my plan' buttons
Payment History - ✅ Shows transaction with plan name, date, amount, and 'paid' badge
Credit Costs section - ✅ Shows all 4 operations with '1 credit' each

stripe_integration_notes: Using live restricted key (rk_live_...). Checkout sessions created successfully. Webhook endpoint handles events without signature verification when STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET not set.
